text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Next year is my senior year... There's a bunch of
big races ahead.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There are so many races I have to run if I'm going
to become someone that makes everyone
happy...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But there was a time when I didn't even know
what to aim for anymore. I would go out to the
track, but my legs just wouldn't start moving...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Then I forced myself to go out to the track one
day, and I happened to see something amazing.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser & Nature
text_block_list.text: YAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That looks fun...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I want to run too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup, hup!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's getting warm! Running in the
morning really does feel great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, as our preparations for the
Diamond Stakes continue...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Is that Rice way out there? I guess she's
doing some morning training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whew! One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I have to get stronger before Bourbon recovers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rrrraaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What a burst of speed! I guess she's over
whatever was bothering her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What a relief! She had me pretty worried back
there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day onward, we see Rice Shower out on
the track running her heart out every day.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, wheeze, pant... It's hard to... breathe...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I can still keep going!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: HAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's it for today! And my time's
looking good too!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Great job today, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourbon! Are you running again?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't run at full capacity yet. I'm doing some
walking instead.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I want to get back to my original
training, but the doctor "explicitly forbid" me
from pushing myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, fortunately enough, it appears I'll
recover earlier than expected.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's great!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're looking a lot better! You seemed pretty
down when I went to see you in the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes... That's true. I was in a state of "dejection" at
that time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I had just run in the Kikuka Sho and was in a state
of "hype" for my senior year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I bet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But still, you're really something! Despite all that,
you're still back on your feet and out here
walking!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, my analysis indicates that my recovery is due
to something beyond my own strength.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I saw Rice running recently.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Everything about her has improved since we last
raced—her form, her speed, and her times.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why myself, but I couldn't take my
eyes off her as she ran.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It reminded me of the praise we exchanged when
we were competing for the Classic Triple Crown,
and the promise we made to continue competing
in our senior year.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She looked so small, running up the ramp so far
away...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But it felt like she was telling me, "You can't give
up here."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So she inspired you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes... Rice is an incredible Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is much quieter than usual
on our way back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rice is the one who inspired Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All I did was tell Bourbon that everything would
be okay back at the hospital...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But just the sight of Rice running was way, waaay
more helpful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, Matikanetannhauser's cheeks
appear flushed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that just... amazing?! I can't find the right
words to describe it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rice motivated Bourbon just by being herself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That means that Rice is like her... well, I don't
think "hero" is exactly the right word.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But she's like this shining figure in her heart that
gives her the courage and strength to keep
going...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: She's her star.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Her star. That's the word I'm looking for.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rice is Bourbon's star. She's incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after that, as if savoring the word, the
continues to say the word "star" over and over
again.
